name: Mekk-Knight Red Moon
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>紅</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ぐ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>蓮</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>れん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>の<ruby lang="jp"><rb>機界騎士</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ジャックナイツ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: If 2 or more cards are in the same column, you can Special Summon this card (from your hand) in that column. You can only Special Summon "Mekk-Knight Red Moon" once per turn this way. You can banish 1 "Mekk-Knight" monster from your GY, then target 1 face-up monster in this card's column; destroy it.
mnst_eff: If 2 or more cards are in the same column, you can Special Summon this card (from your hand) in that column. You can only Special Summon "Mekk-Knight Red Moon" once per turn this way. You can banish 1 "Mekk-Knight" monster from your GY, then target 1 face-up monster in this card's column; destroy it.
eff: If 2 or more cards are in the same column, you can Special Summon this card (from your hand) in that column. You can only Special Summon "Mekk-Knight Red Moon" once per turn this way. summoning: Special Summons itself from your hand
Special Summon by its own condition once per turn
